message:
deps: bump brotli 6.0 -> 8.0.2

Two major bumps (6 -> 7 -> 8) to the Dropbox pure-Rust brotli implementation.
The stable public surface used here is untouched:

- brotli::Decompressor::new(reader, buf_size)
- brotli::BrotliCompress(&mut reader, &mut compressed, &params)
- brotli::enc::BrotliEncoderParams { ... }

Transitive brotli-decompressor also bumped 4.0.3 -> 5.0.0.

This dep is on the btrfs compressed-extent decode path (ffs-mvcc).
Brotli-encoded output is format-stable at the stream-layer level; any
bit-level differences in new compressor output only affect NEW writes,
and the decoder still accepts any RFC-7932 conformant stream produced by
the old encoder.

Verification:
  - rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets: clean
  - rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-mvcc --lib: 398 passed / 0 failed
    (covers both compress and decompress paths in-process)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -287,9 +287,9 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "brotli"
-version = "6.0.0"
+version = "8.0.2"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "74f7971dbd9326d58187408ab83117d8ac1bb9c17b085fdacd1cf2f598719b6b"
+checksum = "4bd8b9603c7aa97359dbd97ecf258968c95f3adddd6db2f7e7a5bef101c84560"
 dependencies = [
  "alloc-no-stdlib",
  "alloc-stdlib",
@@ -298,9 +298,9 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "brotli-decompressor"
-version = "4.0.3"
+version = "5.0.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "a334ef7c9e23abf0ce748e8cd309037da93e606ad52eb372e4ce327a0dcfbdfd"
+checksum = "874bb8112abecc98cbd6d81ea4fa7e94fb9449648c93cc89aa40c81c24d7de03"
 dependencies = [
  "alloc-no-stdlib",
  "alloc-stdlib",

@@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ tracing-subscriber = "0.3.23"
 xxhash-rust = { version = "0.8.15", features = ["xxh3"] }
 fuser = { version = "0.16.0", features = ["abi-7-31"] }
 zstd = "0.13.3"
-brotli = "6.0"
+brotli = "8.0.2"
 flate2 = "1.0"
 lzokay-native = "0.1"
